general.httpListenHint: Local HTTP proxy address and port
general.socks5ListenHint: Local SOCKS5 proxy address and port
general.extraLinesHint: Additional key=value entries for the [General] section, one per line.

mitm.label: [MITM] Section Content
mitm.hint: Raw content of the [MITM] section. Typically contains hostname = *.example.com and other MITM settings.

host.label: [Host] Section Content
host.hint: DNS mapping rules. Maps domain names to IP addresses or other domains.

urlRewrite.label: [URL Rewrite] Section Content
urlRewrite.hint: HTTP URL rewrite rules. Format: regex replacement type (302 / 307 / reject / header).
